productDisplayName: Timberland Men Jeunes Black Casual Shoes
description: Dress your growing up kids in casual comfort in the timberland Youth's Riverquest Closed Toe floaters. Designed with leather and rubber, this sandal offers ample breathable comfort and keeps your young one's feet fresh and dry all day long. Upper Leather upper with straps on the forefoot, midfoot and backfoot for ultimate comfort and breathability Velcro closures on the forefoot, midfoot and backfoot to offer a customised Fit Complete padded fabric inner lining for all-day comfort Cushioned foam footbed for sweat-free all-day comfort Outsole Grippy rubber outsole with lugs on the forefoot and heel, and brandname running across the length as a lug for absolute grip and traction Floater care Wipe dust with a clean and dry cloth Use a branded leather conditioner and brush Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
